entity.summary: Decentralized perpetual and spot exchange by Morphex, with a Classic AMM spot-trading surface and active recent DEX volume.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies BMX by Morphex as a decentralized perpetual exchange and reports recent and cumulative Classic AMM spot volume. The first-party BMX domain is preserved but was not fully fetched during this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: BMX official website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party BMX domain is preserved, but the page could not be fully fetched during this review pass; current protocol activity is corroborated independently.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies BMX by Morphex as a decentralized perpetual exchange and reports recent 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour Classic AMM DEX volume plus substantial cumulative volume.

evidence.title: BMX Classic AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies BMX Classic AMM and corroborates the exchange identity.
